message:
fix(bundler): fix bugs and add --force flag for bundle install

Bug fixes from code review:
- Fix stderr flush in run_remove (was incorrectly flushing stdout)
- Add warning when --sign flag is used (feature not yet implemented)
- Add --force flag to separate reinstall behavior from --no-verify
- Fix error message in install.rs (--allow-unsigned -> --no-verify)

Also fixes unused `mut` warning in test file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
